Zhou Mingrui.primary_clothing: everyday wear: brownish-yellow coat with matching felt hat with rounded edge; formal wear: black vest with matching suit, tight trousers, and halved top hat
Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear
Zhou Mingrui.distinguishing_features: carries a brass revolver concealed in left coat pocket; keeps banknotes clasped in left palm pressing against the gun handle when walking through crowded streets; the halved top hat is a signature item for formal dress
Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: Text explicitly describes both outfit combinations and the revolver-concealment habit in detail.
Zhou Mingrui.era_clothing_lock: brownish-yellow wool coat with matching rounded-brim felt hat for daily errands; black vest and matching black suit with tight trousers and a vertically halved top hat for formal occasions — both fully Victorian in silhouette

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: knows ancient Feysac language and Hermes language; scholarly bearing; brass revolver kept on desk
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver vine-leaf pocket watch (father's heirloom, second-hand, frequently malfunctions); brass-cylinder revolver kept in desk drawer
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 3 explicitly describes Klein's silver vine-leaf pocket watch with a portrait of his father inside the cover, and a semi-regulated brass-cylinder revolver

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Text states he 'worked for several years' and 'using the convenience of working at an import and export company, he purchased a brand new gas lamp which was nearly at cost price'

King George III.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, fair skin, regal authoritative face, wearing royal attire and a crown
King George III.color_palette: gold, royal blue, crimson red, white
King George III.source_notes: Described on the money note as having two mustaches.

Wendy Smyrin.age_range: seventies (explicitly stated as seventy-plus years old)
Wendy Smyrin.hair_style: presumably tied back, full head of grayish-white hair
Wendy Smyrin.primary_clothing: modest Victorian dress, perhaps with an apron
Wendy Smyrin.face_description: elderly woman in her seventies with a habitually warm, genial smile; appears lively and humorous despite her age
Wendy Smyrin.visual_anchor: seventy-plus female, completely grayish-white hair, kind wrinkled face with a genial smile, wearing a modest Victorian dress
Wendy Smyrin.distinguishing_features: always wears a genial smile; has sold bread from the same bakery since Klein's earliest memories; known and friendly with the Moretti family
Wendy Smyrin.role: supporting — owner of Smyrin Bakery on the street near Iron Cross Street, sells bread and pastries
Wendy Smyrin.source_notes: Text explicitly states 'seventy-plus year old granny named Wendy Smyrin. Her hair was completely grayish-white and she always wore a genial smile.'

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.hair_style: straight, reaching down to vest level
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.face_description: Thin, slightly pale face with lustrous skin that retains a youthful glow despite limited nutrition; brown eyes that carry sharp, piercing intelligence and frequent exasperation
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage girl, pale thin face with lustrous skin and sharp brown eyes, black hair reaching to the vest, wearing a tattered inherited veil cap, plain Victorian working-class dress with a self-sewn book bag over her shoulder
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Gifted mechanical aptitude — repaired a malfunctioning pocket watch that professional watchsmiths could not fully fix; deeply practical and emotionally reserved
Melissa Moretti.accessories: tattered veil cap (inherited from her late mother), self-sewn book bag for carrying school stationery
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 3 explicitly states brown eyes, black hair to vest level, thin slightly pale face with lustrous skin, age 15 last July (now ~16), student at Tingen Technical School Steam & Machinery dept, wears mother's tattered veil cap, carries self-sewn book bag
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.distinguishing_features: historical legend; credited with inventing steam engine, modern sailing improvements, tarot divination, and card game systems; led the era of Southern Continent colonialism via marine fleets
Roselle Gustav.faction: Intis Republic / Intis Empire (founder); recognized by God of Craftsmanship (later God of Steam and Machinery)
Roselle Gustav.role: historical figure — Intis Republic's Consul, later self-proclaimed Emperor Caesar; inventor of the steam engine, tarot divination, and contemporary card game systems; recognized by the God of Craftsmanship; assassinated in year 1198 of the Fifth Epoch at the White Maple Palace by combined forces of the Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun, the Sauron family (former Intis royal family), and aristocrats
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Extended historical exposition in chapter text covering Roselle's full biography, titles, achievements, and assassination.

God of Steam and Machinery.primary_clothing: Victorian inventor attire with a leather apron over a formal suit
God of Steam and Machinery.face_description: Intelligent, calculating face with precise features and sharp, observant eyes.
God of Steam and Machinery.visual_anchor: ageless male, average build, neat grey hair, amber eyes, wearing a leather apron over a Victorian suit
God of Steam and Machinery.color_palette: brass yellow, steel grey, leather brown, coal black
God of Steam and Machinery.distinguishing_features: Originally known as the God of Craftsmanship; born in the Fourth Epoch.
God of Steam and Machinery.faction: Church of the God of Steam and Machinery
God of Steam and Machinery.source_notes: History and previous name provided in the discussion between Klein and Dunn.

Tarot Reader.primary_clothing: pointed black hat, long black dress
Tarot Reader.face_description: face obscured by heavy red and yellow stage paint; striking grayish-blue eyes described as 'profound', suggesting depth and intensity
Tarot Reader.visual_anchor: woman of unknown age with profound grayish-blue eyes behind a face painted red and yellow, wearing a tall pointed black hat and floor-length Victorian black dress, operating a small divination tent at a circus square
Tarot Reader.distinguishing_features: face smeared with red and yellow paint matching the circus performers nearby; hoarse voice; sets up a short tent for divination at the municipal square circus
Tarot Reader.faction: circus / traveling performer; practices tarot divination
Tarot Reader.role: minor — carnival divination reader who offers Klein a free tarot reading
Tarot Reader.source_notes: Text explicitly describes: 'a woman wearing a pointed hat and a long black dress standing in front of a short tent. Her face was smeared with red and yellow paint and her eyes were a profound grayish-blue.' Voice described as hoarse.
Tarot Reader.era_clothing_lock: tall pointed witch-style black hat, full-length black dress in Victorian silhouette, face heavily painted with red and yellow stage paint
